raw_consumer_statement:
Disputing ALL charges made to HOMEBASS with the bank institution Citibank. Statements that are being disputed range from XX/XX/XXXX- XX/XX/XXXX. I was told to send, by mail, all statements with charges marked for the dispute and to add all proof for the disputes. The dispute center also said this would be the only way to dispute charges over that long of a time period and that I would have no problem disputing since I was disputing a service that was never provided on XX/XX/XXXX. I have sent all statements with highlights on the charges in question, I have sent all proof that the event was cancelled, including news articles, flyers, and even the website www.homebass.com where you can see that the event was cancelled. There has been little communication from XXXX other than them pushing back the refunds later and later. I have not received any update from Citibank on the status of the mail that I had sent, and keep getting the run around from their dispute center. I have not received my complete refund or dispute resolution from either party.. 

I bought an event package, the event was canceled the day it was scheduled to happen, and I have not received a refund from the event. My next course of action was to dispute the charges. Citibank has been running me around in circles even though I have sent in all the proof and information they need to finish my case.
